message:
I've been slowly building up my family's emergency kit over the past year, and I realized I was basically guessing at what we actually needed. Turns out there's a really straightforward resource from Ready.gov that walks through the basics—water, first aid, important documents, that kind of thing—in a way that doesn't feel overwhelming. It's nice to have a checklist so you're not second-guessing yourself at 11 p.m. on a random Tuesday.

What's the one item you always forget to stock up on?
